title: Payment processing failures in US-West region
summary: Payment transactions failing with timeout errors in US-West region. Approximately 30% of transactions affected. Issue isolated to connection pool exhaustion on payment-gateway-west-2.
customer_impact_summary: Customers in US-West region experiencing payment failures. Retry usually succeeds on second attempt.
internal_impact_summary: On-call team engaged. Payment operations team monitoring transaction success rates.
detection_details: PagerDuty alert triggered on payment_success_rate < 95% threshold

timeline.description: First payment timeout errors appear in logs
PagerDuty alert fires, on-call engineer paged
Initial investigation shows connection pool at 100% utilization
Identified spike in long-running transactions from partner API
Increased connection pool size from 50 to 100 on payment-gateway-west-2
Transaction success rate recovering, now at 92%

hypotheses.description: Connection pool exhaustion caused by slow partner API responses
Memory leak in payment-gateway causing connection accumulation
Partner API may have deployed a change causing latency increase

action_items.description: Contact partner API team to investigate latency spike
Add circuit breaker for partner API calls

evidence.description: Connection pool utilization at 100% for 8 minutes
Trace showing partner API calls taking 30s+ vs normal 500ms
